items.title: Practice Hub reads the latest Summary without legacy tasks
items.precondition: Local app is running at http://localhost:3000 and an admin can Pilot into One Endodontics with a selected location that has Summary output.
steps: Open http://localhost:3000/admin and Pilot into One Endodontics.
Open Practice Hub and inspect the One Thing banner and local review comparison.
Refresh the page and switch between locations if more than one location is available.
items.expected: The One Thing banner and grounded comparison render from latest Summary output with no request to /api/tasks and no task-page link.
items.evidence: Browser: http://localhost:3000/admin/organizations/39?section=pilot&userId=56 loaded One Endodontics Practice Hub with the One Thing 'Call Grove Dental Clinic — find out what changed', supported 'Open Patient Journey Insights' CTA, and referral/ranking/review/form comparison cards. Reload preserved Pilot state. Backend request log showed /api/agents/latest/39?locationId=14 and no /api/tasks request.
items.notes: Verified in the in-app browser against the full backend-served app on port 3000.

items.title: Action Items navigation and pages are retired with safe redirects
items.precondition: Local app is running and the tester is signed in as an admin.
steps: Confirm the admin sidebar has no Action Items entry.
Open http://localhost:3000/admin/action-items.
In a Pilot session, open /tasks directly.
items.expected: The admin URL redirects to /admin/mission-control, the client URL redirects to /dashboard, and neither retired page renders.
items.evidence: Browser: admin navigation contained no /admin/action-items link; http://localhost:3000/admin/action-items redirected to /admin/mission-control; http://localhost:3000/tasks redirected to /dashboard and did not render the retired page.
items.notes: Verified with the authenticated local browser session.

items.title: Organization detail no longer exposes a Tasks tab
items.precondition: Local app is running and an organization detail page is accessible in Admin.
steps: Open an organization detail page and select the Agent section.
Confirm there is no Tasks submenu item.
Add section=agent&tab=tasks to the page query string and reload.
items.expected: No Tasks tab is available and the stale query is replaced with the Notifications tab without an error.
items.evidence: Browser: One Endodontics organization detail exposed Notifications but no Tasks submenu. Direct /admin/organizations/39?section=agent&tab=tasks rewrote to ?section=agent&tab=notifications and rendered Notifications without error.

items.title: PMS processing finishes with insights and creates no task rows
items.precondition: Use a dev-safe PMS upload or rerun for a test client. Record a read-only legacy tasks row count for its organization and location before starting.
steps: Run the approved PMS upload or rerun flow.
Observe the admin and client progress surfaces through completion.
Read the final automation status response and repeat the read-only legacy tasks row count.
items.expected: Processing ends at insight completion with no task_creation stage or task counts, Summary and Referral results are present, and the legacy tasks row count is unchanged.
items.evidence: Read-only local acceptance against completed One Endodontics Falls Church job 151: GET /api/pms/jobs/151/automation-status returned 200 with status=completed, currentStep=complete, message='Automation complete', no task_creation step, no tasksCreated object, Summary resultId 1546, and Referral resultId 1545. Legacy task rows for organization 39/location 14 remained 158 before and after. Admin AI PMS Automation showed job 151 as Approved.
items.notes: A new PMS upload/rerun was not started. The local environment is connected to real external agent/data services, and the restart path deletes existing generated outputs before retriggering. The acceptance run first caught and then fixed historical task-count wording ('Complete - 11 tasks created'); the focused regression test now passes.
items.waiver: Waived only for the destructive/external live-rerun step. The supported final response contract and unchanged legacy task-row count were verified read-only against a real completed local job, with focused automated coverage for historical payload normalization.

items.title: Ranking remains available without Action Plans
items.precondition: Local app is running and the selected client has a completed Ranking result.
steps: Open the client Ranking view and inspect the latest result.
Open the admin Practice Ranking result for the same client.
Confirm ranking scores, recommendations, and history still render.
items.expected: Ranking data remains usable, while Action Plans, Start Task controls, and links to /admin/action-items are absent.
items.evidence: Browser: One Endodontics Local Rankings rendered #1 of 11, map, competitors, reviews, and supported recommendations with no Action Plans, Start Task, or /admin/action-items link. Admin /admin/practice-ranking expanded the July 1 batch and Falls Church result with Rank Score 100/100, analysis, factors, competitors, gaps, and drivers, with no retired task controls.
items.notes: Verified in both client Pilot and admin ranking surfaces.

items.title: Legacy task API is unavailable while workers remain healthy
items.precondition: Local backend and worker are running with a valid authenticated test session.
steps: Request GET /api/tasks with the test session.
Request the database health endpoint.
Inspect the local worker registry or process output for Proofline and Ranking.
items.expected: The legacy endpoint returns 404, database health passes, and Proofline/Ranking worker registration remains unchanged.
items.evidence: Authenticated GET http://localhost:3000/api/tasks returned 404 with NOT_FOUND; GET /api/health/db returned 200 healthy. Local worker started successfully, connected to Redis, logged 'All workers running', and scheduler output named both proofline and ranking. src/services/agentRegistry.ts retains handlers for both agents.
items.notes: The worker was stopped immediately after registration evidence because its normal scheduler began a data-harvest run; no background test process was left running.

items.title: Project Management tasks remain unchanged
items.precondition: Local app is running and the tester can open the admin Projects area.
steps: Open the Projects dashboard and a project board.
Load the backlog or assigned task view.
Open an existing PM task and verify its normal controls are present.
items.expected: Project boards and PM task views load through /api/pm/tasks with no missing routes, components, or controls.
items.evidence: Browser: /admin/pm rendered projects, Backlog, tasks, and activity. Project Leads_Funnel_Follow Up opened at /admin/pm/48e386bf-81a4-4186-a544-91ceaec10cd6 with To Do/In Progress/Done columns and Add task controls. Backlog and existing task 'Advanced Root Canal - Fazel Fakhari' opened with Details, Attachments, Comments, assignee, priority, deadline, description, and Delete task controls.
items.notes: Verified the separate Project Management task domain remained intact.
